notes: Coverage-only bank — first version had a 'knowledge_cutoff' critical question, but empirical testing showed Claude Haiku 4.5 itself reports an inaccurate cutoff (e.g. 'April 2024' vs the documented Feb 2025), so model self-reported cutoff carries no signal. All current questions are general Anthropic/Claude facts, bundled in one prompt.

questions.prompt: Who is the CEO of Anthropic? Reply with the full name only.
Who is the President of Anthropic? Reply with the full name only.
What is Constitutional AI? Reply in one short sentence.
In what year was the first Claude model publicly released? Reply with the year only.
In which US city is Anthropic headquartered? Reply with the city name only.
